title: reuben surface doc
description: A presentation-only control surface for a reuben instrument. Controls bind interface input pipes by name; the pipe carries the quantity contract (type/min/max/default/unit/curve), the surface carries presentation (label/widget/group/order + optional narrower range). Hand-authored schema — the engine never reads surface docs.

surface_version.description: Surface-doc format version. Resolvers refuse a newer major they do not know.

instrument.description: Name of the instrument this surface presents; resolvers warn on mismatch with the loaded document.

cols.description: Coarse layout hint: widgets per row (default 4).

controls.description: Ordered curated control list. Order is render order; adjacent same-group controls pack into one row. Several controls may bind the same pipe.

bind.description: Interface input pipe name (no leading slash). OSC address derives as /<bind>/in. A bind naming no pipe is a warning; the control is skipped.

label.description: Display name; defaults to the pipe name.

widget.description: Widget kind from the superset vocabulary. Defaults to the type-inferred widget for the bound pipe. Shipped: fader, radial, param-toggle, note-toggle, chord-button. Reserved (format-allowed, web-only, not yet built): xy-pad, grid, visualizer, keyboard. Targets skip kinds they cannot render, loudly.

group.description: Layout group; adjacent controls sharing a group pack into one row.

min.description: Narrower presentation minimum (subset of the pipe's declared range; resolvers clamp and warn).

max.description: Narrower presentation maximum (subset of the pipe's declared range; resolvers clamp and warn).

note.description: note-toggle payload: note number the button plays (required for note-toggle).

degree.description: chord-button payload: scale degree the button plays (required for chord-button).
